name: ai-design-rules
description: AI-executable design constraint instructions for UI component libraries

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/cli && git push --follow-tags
